artifact: Filters mythic card printings banned in Gladiator.
sql: SELECT c.name FROM cards AS c JOIN legalities AS l ON c.uuid = l.uuid WHERE c.rarity = 'mythic' AND l.status = 'Banned' AND l.format = 'gladiator';

raw_response.sql: SELECT c.name FROM cards AS c JOIN legalities AS l ON c.uuid = l.uuid WHERE c.rarity = 'mythic' AND l.status = 'Banned' AND l.format = 'gladiator';
raw_response.artifact: Filters mythic card printings banned in Gladiator.

token_notes: Codex sub-agent token usage is visible to the Codex product, not to this local Node runner.
